message.content:
#set page(margin: 1in)
#set text(font: "New Computer Modern", size: 11pt)

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[Inline and Display Mathematics] \
  Source-backed grouped formula sample \
  #v(1em)
])

= Expressions

*Expression 1.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ = integral.double.double.double.double.double dt d theta d phi d t' d theta' d phi' (sin theta sin theta' Phi_(-)(t, theta, phi) Phi_(-)(t', theta', phi')) / ([cosh((t - t') / a) - (sin theta sin theta' cos(phi - phi') + cos theta cos theta')]^h) $

*Expression 2.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ (V(psi op(otimes) bar(w), z) (ket(chi)_l op(otimes) ket(bar(u))_l))_m := lim_(bar(z) -> 0) bar(z)^(bar(Delta)_j + bar(Delta)_l - bar(Delta)_m) (phi(psi op(otimes) bar(w); z, bar(z)) (ket(chi)_l op(otimes) ket(bar(u))_l))_m $

*Expression 3.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ gamma^(-1/2) e^phi [ (delta cal(S)) / (delta gamma_(i j)) (delta cal(S)) / (delta gamma_(k l)) gamma_(i k) gamma_(j l) + 1/2 ((delta cal(S)) / (delta phi))^2 + gamma_(i j) (delta cal(S)) / (delta gamma_(i j)) (delta cal(S)) / (delta phi) ] = 0 $

*Expression 4.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ + 1/2 G_(i j) G^(alpha beta) partial_alpha Phi^i partial_beta Phi^j (1 + (tilde(b)) / (2 pi^2 alpha')) + 1 / (8 pi g_s) integral d^4 x 1/4 F_(alpha beta) tilde(F)^(alpha beta) ((c + C_0 b) / (2 pi^2 alpha')) $

*Expression 5.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ Delta_(epsilon, overline(epsilon))^( (1) ) = (sigma^2) / 2 dot (m - i epsilon hat(p)) / (2 m) dot (m - i overline(epsilon) overline(p)) / (2 m) dot (1 - sigma_p^2) = Psi_(epsilon, overline(epsilon)) dot overline(Psi)_(epsilon, overline(epsilon)) $
